theScene: It doesn't take the two of you long to reach your destination, and she carefully settles the both of you behind some bushes a fair distance from the stony entrance to the dark caverns, draping a camouflage blanket over both of you before setting up a small mana dampening field to make it harder for you both to be detected.
With both of you well hidden she pulls out a small set of binoculars, and peers out from the bush with a small smile.
A dramatic pause hangs in the air after Elly's statement, and the wind whistles through the air, rustling the bushes and trees... This may take a while.
You start to settle into your hiding spot for the long run while Elly gazes intensely out from within the bush to the night-lit cavern entrance and surrounding forest.
Then right before you start to get bored, Elly lets out a quiet gasp, whispering seriously.
There she is. Don't move too much.

She gingerly passes you the binoculars to peer through, letting you look out to see Venefica, slowly and confidently striding by, entering into the cavernous maw that descends into the mountains, a wicker basket carried on one upturned arm.
Now we need to carefully tail her... Confronting her up here leaves too many open variables for things to go wrong.

The two of you then proceed to follow Venefica from a solid distance away, descending down into the crystal lit caverns, deeper and deeper into the damp cave network, the local monsters not bothering any of you, likely due to Venefica's presence.

But yet deeper still the two of you trail after Venefica, almost losing her in the increasingly dark caves, a slight, hazy miasma starting to flit through the air as you and Elly keep pace, traversing ever deeper after the witch.

Until she stops dead at a multilinked cavern crossroad, pausing there for a few long seconds before letting out a tired sigh and turning to face where you and Elly are carefully positioned behind rocks and alcoves in the stone halls with a deathly gaze.
Both you and Elly freeze in place, an icy chill running though each of you from the intense glare and call out.
Before you can act Elly rounds the corner, dramatically pointing a finger at Venefica, and adjusts her glasses in tandem.
That's right! I've got you all figured out now, Venefica!
So I {i}was{/i} being followed... And by {i}you{/i}. I had a feeling you were the one who did it...
You can see Elly sweat slightly as she realizes she didn't need to hop out at that exact moment.
I-Indeed it is! And I brought help to sort out whatever evil schemes you're up to!
Wait, seriously? You're still on about- ...Then that wouldn't make any sense...
Venefica pouts thoughtfully as you cautiously step out from your own hiding spot.
Uhmm... Your evil candy shop plan is at an end?
I don't think she's taking us seriously...
Venefica snaps out of her thoughts as she looks to you coldly, sending a slight chill through you.
Oh, so you were spying on me for her, hm...
I would be more upset if you weren't such a good customer... And it's not like you could have found out anything important.
Now if you two will excuse me, I have more important things to take care of-
The witch starts to turn away towards one of the other pathways, and Elly raises her hands as she starts to glow with magic.
Hold it right there Dread Witch Venefica- You're not going anywhere until I get to the bottom of this.
Venefica's gaze turns to the two of you, and Elly doesn't flinch in the slightest.
I just said I don't have {i}time{/i} for your {i}inane nonsense{/i}-
I swear you're worse than that priestess-
The magical glow fades from Elly as she sputters indignantly.
Venefica lets out another tired sigh and her eyes flit back to the tunnel she was facing, and her expression turns strained.

An inky black, magic spear streaks out from the tunnel slams into the center of Venefica's chest sending her staggering backwards, her wicker basket flying off down a tunnel while the sudden magic attack soaks into the woman's body. This leaves Elly sputtering for an all new more serious reason.

Venefica lets out a unintelligible response as she grasps at the quickly disappearing 'spear' with her obsidian clad hands to no avail, and before you or Elly can try to help her, Venefica is left leaning forward slightly, gasping, the spear absorbed into her body, and you can see a slight change occurring across her skin as she unsteadily turns to you.

Obsidian tattoos crawl across from the magic's point of impact over the witch's body, her posture up-righting, making her impressive bust bounce as her grin twists widely at the two of you, a magical aura starting to swirl throughout the caverns around her.
You {i}know{/i}, the two of you would make for wonderful pets...♥ The mere idea is so intoxicating-♥
Hahhh,♥ I simply {i}love{/i} the idea so much.♥ I'll show you that {i}love{/i} until you're both melting in ecstasy, and {i}love{/i} the idea too.♥
Venefica lets out a slightly unhinged laugh, and Elly recomposes herself, adjusting her glasses.
I have absolutely {i}no{/i} idea what's going on. But I'm very glad I made preparations for such an event! Get ready [ThePlayerName]!
That's right! I've got everything figured out now, Venefica!
So I {i}was{/i} being followed... And by {i}you{/i}. I had a feeling you were the one who did it...
You can see Elly sweat slightly as she realizes she didn't need to hop out at that exact moment.
Hold on! I know this probably looks bad- But I'm here to help you out. I realized you're not up to anything- uh-
That you're not up to any evil schemes...
Do you really think that apologetic act is going to get me to drop my guard?
Magic begins to visibly flow around Venefica's body and Elly eventually looks to you with a strained expression.
W-Wait! Seriously! W-We're here to help you with- you know- d-diary! [TPN]-[ThePlayerName] back me up already!
Venefica's magic fades as you take up a position by Elly, and the witch looks to you coldly, sending a slight chill through you.
Oh, so you were spying on me for her, hm... And by the sounds of it... Found my diary. A little rude to read that...
I would be more upset if you weren't such a good customer... But if the two of you know about that- then you couldn't be...
Something happened to you down here in the caverns right? That's what we're here to help with- I know you wouldn't listen to me if we met up anywhere else. So- Let us help you figur-
Not interested. I can handle my problems on my own. I have no use for help from someone like you.
Venefica unceremoniously turns away, barely regarding either of you with much importance.
Wha- You're stumped on this and you know it!
Venefica's gaze turns to the two of you, and Elly doesn't flinch in the slightest.

Tch- You're starting to get on my nerves. I don't need your pathetic excuse for help, I don't need to 'cross reference notes', I don't have any interest in sharing 'my thoughts about this', and I certainly don't need you trying to snag some semblance of my research from me!
Th-That's... That's not what this is about at all- I- Please- Whatever's happening- it's clearly dangerous-
Oh {i}can it{/i} already, they got the drop on me once, they won't do it again- UGH, Now I need a long walk to clear my head from your blithering nonsense-
Venefica lets out a tired sigh and her eyes flit back to the tunnel she was planning to head down, and her expression turns strained.

An inky black, magic spear streaks out from the tunnel slams into the center of Venefica's chest sending her staggering backwards, her wicker basket flying off down a tunnel while the sudden magic attack soaks into the woman's body. This leaves Elly sputtering in a panic.
W-Wait {i}no!{/i} Gh- All I ended up doing was making an opening for- And it's entirely different this time- G-Goddess damn it- Wh-What do we-

Venefica lets out a unintelligible response as she grasps at the quickly disappearing 'spear' with her obsidian clad hands to no avail, and before you or Elly can try to help her, Venefica is left leaning forward slightly, gasping, the spear absorbed into her body, and you can see a slight change occurring across her skin as she unsteadily turns to you.

Obsidian tattoos crawl across from the magic's point of impact over the witch's body, her posture up-righting, making her impressive bust bounce as her grin twists widely at the two of you, a magical aura starting to swirl throughout the caverns around her.
You {i}know{/i}, the two of you would make for wonderful pets...♥ The mere idea is so intoxicating-♥
Hahhh,♥ I simply {i}love{/i} the idea so much.♥ I'll show you that {i}love{/i} until you're both melting in ecstasy, and {i}love{/i} the idea too.♥
Venefica lets out a slightly unhinged laugh, and Elly recomposes herself, adjusting her glasses.
Okay- First things first- We need to stop Venefica. I'm very glad I made preparations for such an event! Get ready [ThePlayerName]!
I've got everything figured out now Venefica! So I'm going to get to the bottom of this right here, right now!
Tch- So I {i}was{/i} being followed... And by {i}you{/i}-

Venefica's eyes go wide as an inky black, magic spear streaks out from behind her, and her body jerkily refuses to move as if controlled by puppet strings, the magical spear slams through her chest, poking out from the front of her body as it slowly absorbs into her form, sending the wicker basket flying off down a tunnel.
Wh- A-Already?! D-Dang it- I was hoping we could-
[ThePlayerName] get ready! It's taking her over faster this time!

You quickly move from your hiding spot to stand by Elly, and Venefica lets out a unintelligible response as she grasps at the quickly disappearing 'spear' with her obsidian clad hands to no avail, Venefica is left leaning forward slightly, gasping, the spear is rapidly absorbed into her body, and you can see a change occurring across her skin as she unsteadily turns to you.

Obsidian tattoos crawl across from the magic's point of impact over the witch's body, her posture up-righting, making her impressive bust bounce as her grin twists widely at the two of you, a magical aura starting to swirl throughout the caverns around her in threatening waves.
You {i}know{/i}, the two of you would make for wonderful pets...♥ The mere idea is so intoxicating-♥
Hahhh,♥ I simply {i}love{/i} the idea so much.♥ I'll show you that {i}love{/i} until you're both melting in ecstasy, and {i}love{/i} the idea too.♥
Venefica lets out a slightly unhinged laugh, and Elly recomposes herself, adjusting her glasses.
Here she comes [ThePlayerName]! I'm very glad we made preparations for this!
She then quietly mutters to herself as Venefica strides dangerously towards the two of you.
I hope we did enough research...
Venefica lays calmly on the ground, lightly gasping as the eldritch markings on her body slowly recede, and Elly leans against a stone wall letting out an exasperated sigh.
With rather surprising quickness Venefica starts to stir, sitting up, clutching the side of her face with a claw hand, her voice icy calm.

Elly lets out another sigh, this time in relief while Venefica takes stock of herself. And you relax slightly as things seem to be winding down, but a chill goes down your spine as you look past Elly, and see a hooded, obscured figured down the tunnel behind her, the darkness making their features hard to make out, but you can see them raising a hand, conjuring another inky black spear pointed right at the petite mage.
Elly giggles slightly at Venefica's confusion, not noting the danger behind her, and you lunge forward into her as the dark magic streaks towards her!

You crash into the mage whose attention turned your way with great disconcertion and confusion, knocking both of you to the floor just as the lance flies past where she was before exploding against a wall harmlessly, this all seems to click something in Venefica's head, her voice an icy, unreadable cold.
Right. It's all coming back now.

Elly having finally registered the danger starts to panic while the two of you disentangle yourselves, the mysterious assailant  already preparing another blast, while Venefica calmly stands up, obsidian tattoos once more starting to crawl across her chocolate skin as she lets out a sigh.
{i}This is bad- This is bad- This is bad!{/i}

As the inky black spear lances forwards, you and Elly pry yourselves apart, trying to dodge the incoming arcane attack, and Venefica lunges past the two of you, shadowy magic coalescing around her- reforming her outfit and hat as she catches the tip of the dark spear in her clawed hand, sending roiling magic scattering to the sides as she glares down at the figure.
The hooded figure jumps back slightly, the darkness shifting behind them as a low, unrecognizable female voice calls out in shock.

The spear quickly twists and breaks down into a swirling orb of undulating dark magic in Venefica's claw as she chuckles smugly, the surrounding miasma of demonic energy in the cavern dissolving and dissipating rapidly.
Well, so was what you did to me.

She fires the crackling blast down the cavern hall with a resounding flare of magic that drains all the ambient demonic energy into it, lighting up the walls as it travels, giving you a brief glimpse of the hooded woman's fully masked face for a split second before the magic erupts in a deafening explosion of pleasure magic. The mask was a smooth white surface painted with smiling full lips and slanted, predatory eyes.
But as the dust settles Venefica clicks her tongue in annoyance, the sight revealing a wavering illusion of the cloaked figure that gradually dissipates, and Venefica's arcane tattoos slowly recede.
You and Elly carefully stand up, the mage brushing herself off as she looks around cautiously, and curtly Venefica addresses both of you after letting out a quick sigh.
What?! We should go after whoever that was!

No. These cave systems are too sprawling for that, and it'd be difficult to sense her amidst the ambient demonic energy... I also doubt she'll be foolish enough to go after me again. I'm sure whatever she's up to has easier targets to go for now...
I- Yeah... You're right... I just- Don't want to leave whoever that is running around...
Venefica nods and starts to walk through the caverns, you and Elly trailing behind her as she continues to talk.
I understand. But running around foolishly won't help. Once it's clear what their goals are, and who they are, I'll be certain to aid in dealing with them.
Of course. They're clearly a danger to my peace and well-being...

And... Thank you both for dispelling that curse from me... Really this whole thing has been rather embarrassing for me... It's strange that sexual relief at the height of its effects seems to be what resolved it...
Well we're happy to help! ...I'm just glad all that snooping around and prying wasn't just a needless invasion of privacy...
An awkward silence hangs in the air for a moment as you all trek through the dimly lit caverns, slowly getting back to the entrance you came in from.
Elly, I would like to mention, you would be a very powerful witch if you chose to be-
Venefica lets out a frustrated noise as she continues.
I know that. I said if you wanted to be one.
Elly practically brims with excitement at the praise for a moment until she notices you looking at her, and she awkwardly clears her throat.
Th-Though- I have zero intention of being a witch.
Venefica lets out a mild sigh as she continues to walk, a slight smile tugging at her lips.
Then you should really reconsider the hat if you're going to not be a witch.
And just because I wear a hat like this, doesn't mean I'm a witch. I'm allowed to wear it just because I like it.
Venefica laughs lightly as you reach the outside finally.
Elly pouts a bit longer before sighing, and then stretching in the open nighttime air.
Well, both of you are free to visit my home any time. I'll be sure to have a reward for you then for helping me with this.
And Elly, I'd like to have tea with you on more neutral terms, I think we got off on the wrong foot...
I- Uh- Really- I mean- Sure! That sounds great.
Venefica gives you both a curt nod before heading off on her own to return home, leaving just you and Elly next to the cave entrance.
After a pause, she lets out a quiet squee of joy, then coughs and recomposes with surprising swiftness.
Ah- Right. [ThePlayerName], let's- head back to town.
The two of you make your way through the forest back towards the town, and your gaze on her slowly wears her down until she cracks.
...I just really liked stories of witches growing up, okay? So meeting Venefica was- uh... really weird for me. I guess... A lot of conflicting feelings. Given she could be a... you know, threat...
She lets out a sigh of relief as you relent your curious stare from her person and head back to town, almost caught off guard as Elly tosses you one more bag of Eros once you reach the gates.
Here, you earned this. I don't really have any special reward for you... But you can keep visiting me at the guild at night, I'm sure there's a lot more we can get up to.
Elly then goes her separate way once you're both inside the town, giving you a smile and as she heads to the guild entrance.

Even as you start to black out you can still manage to Venefica confidently stride over to Elly's prone form, the mage now a bit more coherent after Venefica had spent her time on you. Elly's face notably red from likely watching at least part of what Venefica did to you.
Now.♥ Lets see if I can make you a good girl.♥
E-Eh- w-wait- h-hold on- I- Eeek!-♥ A-Aaa-♥
But you pass out entirely before you can see what teasing pleasure Venefica gives to Elly, vanishing with the aid of your recall stone...

Even as you start to black out you can still manage to see Venefica curiously prowling over to Elly's prone form, the mage now a bit more coherent after Venefica had spent her time on you. Elly's face notably red from likely watching at least part of what Venefica did to you.
Well I suppose I can have fun with you for now.♥
E-Eh- w-wait- h-hold on- I- Eeek!-♥ A-Aaa-♥
But you pass out entirely before you can see what teasing pleasure Venefica gives to Elly, vanishing with the aid of your recall stone...
You wake up in the church slightly dazed as you recover, still feeling completely exhausted and drained.
Ah?! [ThePlayerName]!? Oh no! I'll get the holy water!
You glance over to blearily see a rather surprised Lillian already at your side, but before she can scamper off to get some holy water-

A rather flustered Elly materializes above you with a pop of magic, facing the opposite orientation to the pedestal you're on, landing on your stomach, leaving you both wheezing in mild pain while Lillian stares unamused.
Before you or Elly can get up to recollect yourselves, Lillian comes back with a large bucket of water-
Lillian responds by unceremoniously dumping the water onto both of you, most of it drenching Elly, before the priestess cheerfully hums while applying her healing magic.
Both you and Elly just kind of damply lay there for a moment in discomfort as Lillian happily does her job, before hopping back with a dramatic twirl.
You and Elly get up from the pedestal, carefully disentangling yourselves, Elly sighing with exasperation as she brushes herself off and works to dry off her clothes and hat.
Soooo... what were you two {i}doing{/i} to get back like this?
Elly carefully sets her hat back on and smooths it out, adjusting her glasses before answering.
An experiment went horrifically awry- but nothing too serious.
Elly sputters for a few moments.
Elly grumbles with indignation a few moments and quickly grabs your wrist and starts leading out of the church.
Come on let's get out of here.
Come on- We have a mess to go clean up.
Be careful [ThePlayerName], don't be taken by her witchy wiles!
Pftwa- I am not {i}witchy!{/i} And I do not have wile- {i}Oh just shut up!{/i}
Lillian snickers a little as the now very pouty Elly drags you outside.
With both of you out of the church and away from Lillian, Elly pulls you to a discreet alley way, letting out an exasperated sigh.
Well that could have gone better...
But all isn't lost yet... Venefica was clearly struggling against that strange influence... I doubt it could fully take her over forever right now... But- This is worse than I expected...
But all isn't lost yet... Venefica was clearly struggling against whatever that influence was... I doubt it could fully take her over forever right now...

Based on what I saw- I'm not sure if she would even remember anything... It's quite likely you can still return to her shop and try to gather more intel on this so we can try to fix whatever mess this is, again... I'm sure we still have time.

Based on what I saw- I'm not sure if she would even remember anything... It's quite likely you can still return to her shop and try to gather more intel on this so we can try to fix whatever mess this is, again... I think my first guess on all my suspicions were...
Let's part here and reconvene when you're ready to confront her again at the caverns... I doubt facing her anywhere else would be safe, and we might be able to catch whoever is really behind this.
She lets out a tired sigh.
At the very least this failure has been informative... Well, we better get going.
You and Elly go your separate ways, leaving you to enter into town square.
With both of you out of the church and away from Lillian, Elly lets out an exasperated sigh.
That could have gone better... I'm sure we can take her with a bit more practice and training...
Hrm... Well, when you're ready just head back there and talk to Venefica when you want to spar with her again.
She lets out a tired sigh.
Anyways, we better get going. I have a few things to take care of at the guild.
You and Elly go your separate ways, leaving you to enter into town square.
